visual_summary: The Grid Pattern component is a customizable SVG representation of a grid, typically used for design purposes or to display grid-based data. It supports adjustable size, position, and appearance, and can optionally include custom point markers. This component can be used when a flexible grid is desired for UI or UX design.

Description: The Grid Pattern component is a customizable SVG representation of a grid, typically used for design purposes or to display grid-based data. It supports adjustable size, position, and appearance, and can optionally include custom point markers. This component can be used when a flexible grid is desired for UI or UX design.
Style: dark, minimal, custom
Interactions: 
Tags: svg, grid, design, customizable

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
